message:
fix(fcp-store): capture over-budget repairs as DeferredCycleBudget instead of dropping silently

New RepairReasonCode::DeferredCycleBudget variant tracks repair actions
that exceed the planner's per-cycle budget on normal (non-power-saver,
non-metered) connections.  Previously the else branch of the budget
check silently dropped these actions, making them invisible to
observability and audit.

Now they are captured as deferred actions with reason
"repair.deferred_cycle_budget" and priority 0, consistent with the
existing DeferredPowerBudget treatment for power-saver networks.

Integration test repair_planner_cycle_improves_zone_slo expanded to
assert: deferred.len() == 1 when budget exhausted, all deferred
actions carry DeferredCycleBudget, and object_count_below_target ==
actions.len() + deferred.len() (conservation check).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
